html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

ItemFloatingDepleted

Sky Lantern is a item that can be crafted at Shrines during any Lunar New Year Events. Once placed on the ground, the Sky Lantern flies up to the sky and lights up a small area. It flies around the map and lasts for 2 days. Its duration runs faster during Rain and much faster during Lunar Hail.

Assets

  • Stage 1
  • Stage 2
  • Stage 3
  • On Floor
plainText:
Sky Lantern
"Cast a comforting warm glow from above."
Object Info
2 days
Crafting
×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"floatinglantern"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events
ItemFloatingDepleted
“The trick is to let it go.”
–Wilson
“I'd hate to share this.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang have a bright secret!”
–Wolfgang
“I should save this for when it's darkest.”
–Wendy
“SINGLE-USE LIGHT UNIT”
–WX-78
“Deployment consists simply of allowing it to ascend upon release.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can't wait to light it up.”
–Woodie
“Just in case...”
–Maxwell
“I shall fear nö darkness!”
–Wigfrid
“We have something fun!”
–Webber
“This will set the mood!”
–Warly
“Sky light”
–Wormwood
“This'll sure come in handy at night.”
–Winona
“Shall I say goodbye and let it fly?”
–Wortox
“Glowy all mine.”
–Wurt
“Should we brighten the mood, Wobes?”
–Walter
“I should use it at nightfall.”
–Wanda
“There we glow!”
–Wilson
“Fire is magic!”
–Willow
“It is watching over Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“It does lift my spirits... a little.”
–Wendy
“SUB-PAR. DOES NOT COMPARE”
–WX-78
“Nothing magical here. It's flotation is merely due to hot air being less dense than the surrounding atmosphere.”
–Wickerbottom
“Aw, that's pretty.”
–Woodie
“Yes, fine. It's nice.”
–Maxwell
“Illuminate my path tö glöry, skyward lantern!”
–Wigfrid
“Wheeee!”
–Webber
“Such a warm comforting glow!”
–Warly
“Fly sky light!”
–Wormwood
“Aww, ain't that pleasant?”
–Winona
“I spy with my impish eye, something glowing high in the sky!”
–Wortox
“Flort? What make glowy fly?”
–Wurt
“Look up, Woby!”
–Walter
“There's something calming about it.”
–Wanda
“Admit deflate!”
–Wilson
“Sigh.”
–Willow
“How sad.”
–Wolfgang
“I knew it couldn't last.”
–Wendy
“AS EXPECTED”
–WX-78
“Now that the thermal lift is gone, it descended accordingly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Had to come down sometime.”
–Woodie
“Ah well.”
–Maxwell
“The light hath faded, yet I shall endure!”
–Wigfrid
“Aww!”
–Webber
“What a pity.”
–Warly
“Why sky light?”
–Wormwood
“All good things I suppose.”
–Winona
“On the ground, no more floating around.”
–Wortox
“What glowy problem?”
–Wurt
“Aw, it was nice while it lasted.”
–Walter
“It's time ran out.”
–Wanda
Sky Lantern is a item that can be crafted at Shrines during any Lunar New Year Events. Once placed on the ground, the Sky Lantern flies up to the sky and lights up a small area. It flies around the map and lasts for 2 days. Its duration runs faster during Rain and much faster during Lunar Hail.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sky Lantern là một vật phẩm có thể được chế tạo tại các Đền thờ trong bất kỳ Sự kiện Tết Nguyên đán nào. Sau khi được đặt trên mặt đất, Sky Lantern bay lên trời và thắp sáng một khu vực nhỏ. Nó bay khắp bản đồ và tồn tại trong 2 ngày. Thời gian tồn tại của nó nhanh hơn khi có Mưa và nhanh hơn nhiều khi có Mưa đá Mặt Trăng.

'''Sky Lantern''' is a item that can be crafted at [[Shrine]]s during any [[Lunar New Year Events]]. Once placed on the ground, the Sky Lantern flies up to the sky and lights up a small area. It flies around the map and lasts for 2 days. Its duration runs faster during [[Rain]] and much faster during [[Lunar Hail]].
{{Clear}}
